user_request: What does the research say about LLM hallucination rates?

messages.content: What does the research say about LLM hallucination rates?
According to Zhang et al. (2024), 'A Survey on Hallucination in Large Language Models', hallucination rates in frontier models range from 3-15% depending on task complexity.

citations.source_text: Zhang et al. (2024), A Survey on Hallucination in Large Language Models

findings.span_text: Zhang et al. (2024), A Survey on Hallucination in Large Language Models
